---
layout: default
title: "Parliamentary Developments and Legislative Updates"
date: 2026-06-30T16:35:19.269316+00:00
summary: "Mallikarjun Kharge resumes his role as Leader of Opposition, while Parliament passes the Transgender Persons Amendment Bill and debates key policy issues"
run_time_ist: "10:05PM"
---

<article class="digest-post">
  <a class="back-link" href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">Political Brief</a>
  <p class="post-meta">Gemini Summary: 10:05PM</p>


<h2 class="section-title">India National Politics</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Leadership and Privilege:</strong> Mallikarjun Kharge has been sworn in as a Rajya Sabha member and resumed his role as Leader of the Opposition, while the Congress party submitted a breach of privilege notice against Defence Minister Rajnath Singh regarding military casualty reports.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiwAFBVV95cUxPVDlScHFfOTVvX0h0Yjl4Nm0teFlFekVOV044c3RDQUNRRll2djFYQWM5TFVTNWxwN09OU3FqZmpGXzZVMndSTS1QbkFlbnlaS1F6V0I3LTZfdDFxVHM0T3VkbFN0WVNSWDVhTDBfaGlkNU5ldlpDakVQT2I0S0lLcEN1NExGTVBaTzVwdUtETi0wU3hnX2h6VXdzMUZydGd0Qk12MjVEUnY5U0VidHo2YktNdzFHVFREYWd1aVIxbHc?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I1</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMirgFBVV95cUxNLVkzVjRKNkd6eGZKZ1N2YS1iYTJnOWtMdzcwaHM4VVpVLUFDenFseFlxbzRxc0EzVVloOFgzOVVvNzRJa1hKak84RVVDYTNiSGp5blJ4TzhsaWREMmJOQjFqRkRYVnpZdWdMcmdRZ1ozczBkV216alF3LV9BVGZDOUtneTZESFNDRUNaa01BNmNZbTdvbHN3cWRaUGtPbkJpZTdKSnhxZWN4TVc0cXc?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I2</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I3</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I4</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiqgFBVV95cUxQcFlqUDlzckpoVE0xaFJfamMxclFVNXA1QWpTWThPZ3h2dWhtUmVSSTh3akc4TF9VMXJYcmZYQnpLZnU4V3JwV2UtVTdKdkw0VEoyb2preE9FOHlCZ0QyNVpDcnN0OGVVdUZKLU5FM1ROUDdKeFAtLVlyX2tISGVHRUkxbUdfT2YyZzkxMWd5a3BlMVh4M0JCanpiSG1TbGV5dE13bXRjTFNlQQ?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I5</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I7</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I8</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Legislative Hurdles:</strong> The Constitutional Amendment Bill for women’s reservation in the Lok Sabha and State Assemblies has failed to pass, even as the NDA strengthens its Rajya Sabha position, impacting the legislative path for major reforms.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiqwFBVV95cUxPSTVKRHVGUXlhNjVqNEczYkNpd1NvbmRYOU5Fd2RIZjV3OHBob0owSzh3LVRXdUVqSDNVZTgtbVZlUG8ybS1wallfSVdTeTRtNENIU0lwV3piczdxV2NEVmE0WC1GSTQyMjR4dkNPb1pqblB2SzNHQjZBRWVXZHpPZXE2bVlQc3NGNEFJVU1NUHJMMFFqSkdRUVFFMGZNRUkzSTc0LXphM1JaLXM?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I21</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMipAFBVV95cUxOeUVWRWFZb3lUbWpJVHNCX0tRTTNsd3JEcHpFWnMxbTFxdVNKUi1MdG5aemREcUxQeGFkS3RRcHo2Rzdya28zMWFiaEN0QURoUHUtOTVlVnZGUy1MbWFGT2F2T0pJRXFtNEFOOTFrNWJsLUFRbFhIS1RJZ2hxNWFMSlRlZHJ6cUlNbUhJMktxSHQwa2hJek8xTmxuSEttM0tMc3BYRQ?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I24</a></span></li>
</ul>

<h2 class="section-title">Policy and Institutions</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Legislative and Judicial Updates:</strong> Parliament passed the Transgender Persons Amendment Bill, 2026, and the Union Cabinet approved a Rs 30,000 crore investment boost for the National Investment and Infrastructure Fund.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiuwFBVV95cUxOS1Y3RmZzYUVKcWZEU082Q3J2S210X3k5NEVLdmVkbTY2TlBsNFZIR2FoWFBrQTFaMDYwcXE3clIzTDN4VV83US1LUmxwd2FVeVZsNW5YeVZHU0ZMUnJLZjhTVjBnRFE2Y2ZpZTMtOWVqYU1TX3BNTHRvZjhscE1yT1JsRjVFYnFITm9GbVVkNEdkVjFrSTNvYldVUU1zSjlGaVZoZDE3T0x1Vmx5VW5ONnNvc0xxQU5kTlkw?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W12</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Ethanol Policy:</strong> The Centre informed the Supreme Court that the E20 ethanol blending program remains in an experimental phase, with final assessment results expected by next year.</li>
</ul>

<details class="tp-sources">

</article>
